refreshToken.title: Hilo Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Your Hilo refresh token — copy this from your homebridge-hilo plugin config.

locationId.title: Location ID (optional)
locationId.description: Your Hilo location URN. Found in homebridge-hilo logs: 'Subscribed to updates for location urn:hilo:crm:...'  Leave blank to auto-discover.
